problem id: 9016e3d3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  10011011 -> 11001001
  00100001 -> 01000010
  01011001 -> 01000101
  01101001 -> 01000110
  00110101 -> 01000011
  10001000 -> 00001000
  10110101 -> 01001011
  01001100 -> 00000100

query: 10011111
predicted answer: 11001001
